Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. Remove all modern
businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, facing street-facing, fov 80
- main street road, 2-lane, asphalt
- sidewalks present, curbs present
- driveways: alley entrance mid-block; parking: parallel street parking both sides
- two-story brick commercial building at left block face, 2 stories, red brick, cast iron storefront columns, flat parapet roof, at sidewalk setback
- single-story retail building at center block face, 1 story, brick, plate glass storefront, flat with low parapet roof, at sidewalk setback
- corner mixed-use building at right corner, 3 stories, brick, stone trim cornice, flat roof, at sidewalk setback
- utilities: overhead power and telephone lines, wooden utility poles every 50 feet
- landscape: concrete sidewalks, brick pavers at crosswalks, small planted tree pits
- immutable elements: cast iron storefront columns on left building, recessed corner entrance on right building, brick alley mid-block
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 2025
Post-pandemic era. A 2025 main street — minimalist flat-logo storefronts, QR codes on the glass, delivery culture in plain view.

PERIOD DETAILS
- the same diner, still going, 'COFFEE $3.50' shown on a small digital menu screen in the window
- boba tea shop with pastel minimalist branding and a QR-code ordering decal
- the old video store space now a specialty coffee bar with a minimalist flat logo
Typography: minimalist geometric sans-serif, heavily simplified flat logos.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 11 people, spread out with empty areas.
- several people looking at smartphones as they walk
- a couple filming a vertical video on a phone gimbal
Clothing: men in bucket hats, techwear; women in high-waisted wide-leg jeans, athleisure. Fashion palette: sage green, beige, cream. No posing or eye contact.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 4 period vehicles, all different:
- 2021-2025 Ford Bronco — retro boxy off-roader — silver
- 2021-2025 Chevrolet Tahoe — huge full-size SUV — dark green
- 2023-2025 Kia Sportage — futuristic boomerang lights — white
- 2022-2025 Ford Maverick — small unibody pickup — black
Parked with gaps; optionally 1 driving; no vehicle newer than 2025.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, high-visibility crosswalks
- utilities: overhead lines in older areas, underground in new developments, fiber optic widespread

TREES
- oak tree at sidewalk left near corner: mature tree, large canopy
- maple tree at sidewalk center in front of retail: maturing tree

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — digital — smartphone or mirrorless camera look.
Color: high saturation. Grain: very clean, minimal to no noise.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
